source_item.title: Apple unseats Nvidia to become world's most valuable company as AI bets shift

slide1_hook.label: Apple Just Dethroned Nvidia. Again.
slide1_hook.subhead: $4.88 trillion vs $4.86 trillion. AI money is shifting.

slide2_backstory.label: THE BACKSTORY
slide2_backstory.headline: Nvidia's Two-Year Reign Atop the Market
slide2_backstory.body: Apple used to be the value king, hitting $1 trillion first back in 2018. Then Nvidia's AI chip boom took over, passing Apple in 2024 and hitting $5 trillion in 2025.

slide3_news.label: THE UPDATE
slide3_news.headline: Apple Reclaims the Crown at $4.88 Trillion
slide3_news.body: Apple's value hit $4.88 trillion, edging past Nvidia's $4.86 trillion after Nvidia shares fell 3.5%. It's Apple's first time back on top since April last year.

slide4_why.label: WHY IT MATTERS
slide4_why.headline: The AI Trade Is Rotating, Not Ending
bullets: AI's next winners may not be chipmakers
Nvidia's still strong, this is just a market swing
Expect more swaps at the top spot

slide5_engage.label: YOUR TAKE
slide5_engage.headline: Apple never built its own AI model but just passed Nvidia anyway. Is AI hype overrated, or is Apple just better at quietly cashing in on it?
slide5_engage.cta: Follow for daily global business stories that actually matter. Drop your take in the comments 👇
